name: io.github.BurtTheCoder/shodan
description: MCP server for Shodan API — device search, IP lookup, DNS, and CVE/CPE queries.

tools.name: shodan_search
tools.description: Query Shodan's database of internet-connected devices with advanced search filters

tools.name: ip_lookup
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive information about an IP address including geolocation, open ports, and services

tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: Resolve domain names to IP addresses using Shodan's DNS service

tools.name: reverse_dns_lookup
tools.description: Find hostnames associated with IP addresses via reverse DNS

tools.name: cve_lookup
tools.description: Query detailed CVE vulnerability information including CVSS scores, EPSS, and KEV status

tools.name: cpe_lookup
tools.description: Search for Common Platform Enumeration entries by product name

tools.name: cves_by_product
tools.description: Search for vulnerabilities affecting specific products or CPE identifiers
